security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: http: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost asset: http://asset.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost

bundle.longDescription: A lightweight desktop Markdown and config-file (JSON / YAML / TOML) viewer built with Tauri v2.
